Meta.homeTitle: 海那边 | Chinese Lessons in Dubai
Meta.homeDescription: Clear, patient and personalized Chinese lessons for families in Dubai and abroad.

Common.eyebrow: 海那边 · Chinese Lessons in Dubai

Home.heroTitle: Chinese can thrive, wherever home is.
Home.heroDescription: Clear, patient and personalized Chinese lessons for children, teenagers and families in Dubai.
Home.heroNote: Online or at the teacher’s home in Dubai · Arranged directly with the teacher
Home.teacherText: This area will introduce the teacher’s name, experience, languages and educational approach. The prototype does not add unverified credentials or results.
Home.ctaTitle: Start with a conversation about your child
Home.ctaText: Share their age, current Chinese experience and goals so the teacher can suggest a suitable arrangement.

About.title: Meet the Teacher
About.subtitle: 认识老师
About.intro: A Chinese classroom that feels clear and reassuring begins with knowing who will teach your child.
About.nameValue: Chinese and English name to be supplied
About.bio: The teacher’s biography, teaching background and connection to Dubai will be added after confirmation. No unverified qualifications or achievements are presented here.
About.philosophy: The teacher’s own philosophy will appear here. It should explain the balance of listening, speaking, reading and writing, age-appropriate choices, and parent communication.
About.nameNoteAfter: gently suggests distance and connection in life abroad. First and foremost, it is a simple, memorable name for a Chinese classroom.

Pricing.title: A simple arrangement that suits the learner
Pricing.intro: Choose between individual, paired, or small-group lessons. The teacher will agree the content and schedule directly with each family.
Pricing.notice: Prices and lesson duration will be confirmed by the teacher. Multi-lesson packages may be offered later at a discount from the standard rate.

Contact.title: Contact the teacher directly
Contact.intro: For lesson availability or any questions, message the teacher using whichever contact method is most convenient.
Contact.messageHint: When messaging, it is helpful to include the learner’s age, current Chinese experience and preferred lesson format.

Footer.tagline: Clear, patient and personalized Chinese learning support for families abroad.
Footer.note: Lesson arrangements are confirmed directly with the teacher.
